title: Origins: The Realm
description:
A Lightweight Origins-based modpack for a Play.Hosting server, designed for adventure and stylized for a vanilla feel.
Simple VoiceChat Now Included!

Icon by: Kyanmass
body:
# What is _Origins: The Realm_?
A light-weight pack designed to be used on a _Play.Hosting_ server. The pack will be changing based on community feedback from the server. 

## What is _Play.Hosting_, and how can I access the server?
A free to use server hosting site created and hosted by Tubbo. 
The server can be accessed through the ip: (currently unavailable)

# Currently OTR is undergoing some changes and is downgrading to 1.20.1 to allow for more mods to be included into the pack. 
The pack is also becoming even more lightweight! Currently with less than 2gb ram required.

### Additional Notes

Sodium is currenlty used to optimize the stability, but can be toggled off or swapped for an optimization of your choice. 

Known bugs: In the 1.0 versions the grave mod does not save backpacks upon death.
